name: React Effect Cleanup Verified
description: React useEffect hooks with subscriptions or timers should have their cleanup logic formally verified to prevent memory leaks.
rationale: Missing or incorrect cleanup in useEffect is a common source of memory leaks and stale state bugs in React applications. Formalizing the setup/teardown contract and verifying it catches issues that are hard to reproduce manually.

examples.passes: Formalize(subscription effect) → Verify(cleanup cancels subscription: proved) → EditFile
examples.fails: EditFile adds a WebSocket subscription in useEffect without verifying cleanup
